rules.name: Block local @mariozechner runtime sources
rules.description: Prevent tool access to vendored @mariozechner packages in local node_modules, except for the Pi README, markdown docs, TypeScript declaration files, and example extensions.
rules.blockMessage: Accessing {file} is not allowed. Treat @mariozechner runtime files as internal implementation details. Only the Pi README, markdown docs, TypeScript declaration files, and example extensions may be accessed.

rules.name: Block Nix store @mariozechner runtime sources
rules.description: Prevent tool access to the installed Pi CLI runtime in /nix/store, except for the Pi README, markdown docs, TypeScript declaration files, and example extensions.
rules.blockMessage: Accessing {file} is not allowed. Treat installed @mariozechner runtime files as internal implementation details. Only the Pi README, markdown docs, TypeScript declaration files, and example extensions may be accessed.
